message:
add run-tui.sh convenience script

Builds and runs serf-tui with env vars from .env.
Defaults to SERF_PROVIDER/SERF_MODEL or openai/gpt-4o-mini.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+cd "$(dirname "$0")"
+
+# Load API keys
+set -a
+source ../../.env
+set +a
+
+# Build
+go build -o serf-tui ./cmd/serf-tui/
+
+# Run
+exec ./serf-tui \
+  --provider "${SERF_PROVIDER:-openai}" \
+  --model "${SERF_MODEL:-gpt-4o-mini}" \
+  "$@"
